heading: Tonight
text: Any evening showers or thunderstorms becoming scattered, mostly north. Some partial clearing. Lows in the 50s. Winds becoming southwest 10 to 15 mph, gusting to 30 mph.

heading: Friday, Juneteenth
text: Morning clouds breaking for periods of sunshine. More afternoon clouds north, with a rising chance of showers or thunderstorms, becoming likely near and north of the Quebec border. Highs in the upper 60s to low 70s north, 70s in the Champlain Valley and south. Winds west 10 to 15 mph, gusting to 30 mph.

heading: Friday Night
text: Mostly cloudy. Evening showers or a thunderstorm north, isolated south, diminishing overnight. Lows in the upper 40s and 50s. Winds west 10 to 15 mph, gusting to 25 mph.

heading: Saturday
text: Becoming mostly cloudy, with a good chance of showers north. Periods of sun, a passing shower south. Highs in the 60s to near 70 north, in the 70s for the Champlain Valley and south. Winds west 10 to 15 mph, gusting to 25 mph.
